name: Mama Llena o Pudin De Pan
recipeIngredient: 3 cups bread moistened in milk, broken up and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine all the ingredients.
2. Pour the mixture into a greased bread pan.
3. Bake in an oven set to 350ºF until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
4. Allow it to cool completely before serving.
5. This can also be made using 3 cups of breadcrumbs and 3 cups of milk.
